candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as SG&A depreciation, so it relates to overhead rather than the selected COGS bucket of Operating costs, Maintenance costs, and Propertytax.
Generic depreciation label with no visible values and no wording tying it to cost of sales/property operating costs; conservatively do not add to COGS to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row tied to the selected COGS rows appears in the operating section. The visible SG&A depreciation row belongs to XSGA, and the generic fixed-assets depreciation row is too ambiguous/empty to add conservatively.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit same-level operating line for SG&A depreciation, separate from the selected XSGA component rows Property administration and Central Administration, so it should be added separately later.
Generic depreciation label with no visible values; less appropriate than the explicit SG&A depreciation row and should not be added alongside it.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Use the explicit SG&A depreciation row only. Do not also include the generic 'Depreciation of Fixed Assets' row, which is ambiguous and would risk double counting.
